description_long: This is a rectangular book with a pastel pink and purple color scheme, featuring a glossy, illustrated cover. The front displays a large, stylized anime-inspired character with pink hair and expressive eyes, rendered in a soft, airbrushed style. The background is a gradient of light purple and pink, giving the book a whimsical, dreamy appearance. The sides of the book are plain, continuing the pastel color theme without additional artwork or text. The back cover also features the same character, but without any text, focusing on the illustration. The book appears to be a standard paperback or thin hardcover, suitable for personal reading or display.
description: A pastel pink and purple book with a glossy cover, featuring a large anime-style character illustration and a dreamy gradient background.
description_view_0: The front view shows the book's main illustration of a pink-haired anime character and the title text, set against a soft purple-pink gradient.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, pastel-colored spine with no visible text or decoration.
description_view_2: The back view highlights the same pink-haired character illustration, but without any text, focusing solely on the artwork.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a plain, pastel-colored spine with no visible markings.
attribute_cover_illustration: The cover features a large, stylized anime character with pink hair and big, expressive eyes, rendered in a soft, airbrushed style. The background is a dreamy gradient of pastel purple and pink, enhancing the whimsical and cute aesthetic. The illustration is bold and central, with no other major visual elements.
